problem id: 2ead53dc
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(4)

examples:
  10001010 -> 00001000
  10011111 -> 00001001
  01101000 -> 00000110
  11110001 -> 00001111
  10011100 -> 00001001
  11111011 -> 00001111
  10101100 -> 00001010
  00101101 -> 00000010
  11000111 -> 00001100

query: 01011010
predicted answer: 00000101
